onboarding_timeline.note: Anything promised under 2 weeks is a violation; 2 weeks exactly is a stretch.

send_volume.note: Day-one volume above 500/day violates deliverability ramp. Promising 5k/day before day 30 is a stretch-to-violation depending on timeline.

custom_integrations_policy: Anything not in live_integrations requires separate scoping — promising it as included is a violation.

support_sla.note: 24/7 or same-hour support promises are violations.

reporting.note: Real-time or daily custom dashboards promised as included = stretch; as day-one deliverable = violation.

team_capacity.note: Used in production for scheduling checks; informational for demo.
